consent_1: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I agree to take part in the University of Sussex research project described in the information page. I have read and understood the Explanatory Statement, which will be sent to me by email for my records. I also understand that I am free to withdraw my data by the EXPECTED CUT-OFF DATE,  2 weeks after the experiment,   is completed by emailing one of the researchers (Dr. David Schwarzman: d.schwartzman@sussex.ac.uk  , Danny Nacker: d.nacker@sussex.ac.uk, or Luise Kalus: lk344@sussex.ac.uk).
consent_2: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I understand that any information I provide is confidential, and that no information that I disclose will lead to the identification of any individual in the reports on the project, either by the researcher or by any other party.
consent_3: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I understand that my participation is voluntary, that I can choose not to participate in part or all of the project, and that I can withdraw at any stage of the project without being penalised or disadvantaged in any way.
consent_4: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I understand that my personal data will be used for the purposes of this research study and will be handled in accordance with Data Protection legislation.  I understand that the University’s Privacy Notice provides further information on how the University uses personal data in its research.
consent_5: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I understand that my data will be stored with my name until the 30/04/2025, afterwards my data will be stored in a de-identified way (e.g. using ID numbers not names).   If I indicate that I want to be contacted for a future study at the end of this study, my email address will be stored separately from all other data collected. Electronic data will be stored securely on a university managed system, and hard-copies   will be stored behind a locked door.
consent_6: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I understand that my anonymised research data will be retained indefinitely.
consent_7: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - I understand that such information will be treated as strictly confidential and handled in accordance with the Data Protection Act 2018.
consent_8: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - This study has been approved by the Sciences and Technology Cross-Schools Research Ethics Committee. The project reference number is ER/LK344/4. If you have any ethical concerns, please contact the ethics chair (crecscitec@sussex.ac.uk). University of Sussex has insurance in place to cover its legal liabilities in respect of this study.
consent_9: Please indicate that you have read and understood each statement and consent to take part in this research study: - By ticking this box, I confirm I have no history of seizures or migraines.
safety_1: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Have you ever been told that you have or had epilepsy?
safety_2: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Have you ever had a seizure?
safety_3: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Has anyone in your immediate family, including your parents, siblings or second-degree relatives, been told that they have epilepsy or suffer from seizures?
safety_4: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Do you find sunlight, bright or flickering lights uncomfortable?
safety_5: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Have you ever had an adverse reaction to flickering or bright lighting?
safety_6: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Do you suffer from frequent or severe headaches including migraines?
safety_7: Do any of the following apply to you? Please answer Yes or No for each question. - Are you currently pregnant?
phq9_1:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Little interest or pleasure in doing things.
phq9_2:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless.
phq9_3:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping to much.
phq9_4:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Feeling tired or having little energy.
phq9_5:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Poor appetite or overeating.
phq9_6:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Feeling bad about yourself, or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down.
phq9_7:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Trouble concentrating on things such as reading the newspaper or watching television.
phq9_8:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite - being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual.
phq9_9:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself.
m3vas_mood_1: On the horizontal line indicate how your mood has been over the past 2 weeks: - Not at all depressed (0)
m3vas_pleasure_1: On the horizontal line indicate your ability to enjoy life activities (e.g. work, family and friends, hobbies, television, books or magazines, meals etc.) over the past 2 weeks. - Fully able to enjoy any activities (0)
m3vas_suicidal_1: On the horizontal line indicate how severely/frequently you have experienced thoughts or feelings about suicide over the past 2 weeks. - Not at all suicidal (0)
incl_dem_gender: What is your gender? (if you feel comfortable sharing this information)
incl_dem_mdd: I am currently experiencing symptoms associated with depression, such as low mood or sadness, for extended periods of time.
incl_dem_sad: Do your symptoms of depression display a seasonal pattern? Are your symptoms usually more apparent and more severe during the winter?
incl_dem_sad_det: If you answered 'Yes' please provide more detail about your seasonal pattern of depression.
incl_dem_med: Are you currently taking any medications, herbs, or supplements?
incl_dem_med_det: If you answered 'Yes', this is not necessarily a problem for you to take part in this study. Please provide details of the treatment, including the name, dosage, and frequency of use.
incl_dem_med_fam: Have you been taking this medication long enough to consider it as familiar to you?
incl_dem_change: Are you planning to change or start treatment for your depressive symptoms in the next EXPECTED TESTING DURATION, this includes therapy, medication or other interventions? - Selected Choice
incl_dem_change_1_TEXT: Are you planning to change or start treatment for your depressive symptoms in the next EXPECTED TESTING DURATION, this includes therapy, medication or other interventions? - Yes! Please indicate what change you are planning to make in the near future. - Text
incl_dem_antipsy: Are you currently being treated with any antipsychotic drugs (e.g. Chlorpromazine or Haloperidol)?
incl_dem_sub: Do you have a history of substance misuse (or substance abuse), or currently have issues relating to substance misuse (or substance abuse)?
incl_dem_diag: Do you have a history of, or current diagnosis of: psychosis, bipolar disorder, Parkinson’s, dementia, or  Alzheimer’s disease?
incl_dem_diag_det: If you answered 'Yes' to the above question, which current diagnosis do you have?
incl_dem_tbi: Do you have any history of Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI)?
incl_dem_eye: Do you have any eye disorders, such as: retinal blindness, cataracts, retinal diseases of the eye, or glaucoma? This does not include wearing glasses or contact lenses.
incl_dem_eye_det: If you answered 'Yes' please give some more detail about the eye disorder you have.
incl_dem_light: Do you regularly use light therapy, including the use of light boxes, light visors and dawn simulation lamps? This does not include the use of SAD (Seasonal Affective Disorder) alarm clocks.
booking:
Please select a slot during which you would like the testing to take place within the next 2 weeks, it will take place in the Chichester III building at the University of Sussex (Falmer campus). The testing sessions will be one hour long.

Once you have chosen a slot we will send you a confirmation email with all the relevant information, the information sheet and consent form you filled out.

Please choose a slot and confirm by going to the NEXT PAGE.
booking_sona: Would you like to get SONA credits for your participation in the main study?
